roa.docketEntryComment: CONFIDENTIAL PPL-Subpoena Duces Tecum Filed to San Francisco Sheriff's Department
Pre-Sentenced Defendant Electronic Monitoring After Release and Report
PROB TRANSFER TO STANISLAUS COUNTY SENT
APD PC1203,9 TRANSFER OUTTO STANISLAUS CO, FILED
PEOPLES MOTION TO CONTINUE PRELIMINARY HEARING FILED
DIST ATTNY MOT TO DETAIN WITHOUT BAIL FILED TODAY

/CAL: APD 1203,9PC  MOTION TO TRANSFER PROBATION FROM SAN FRANCISCO  COUNTYTO STANISLAUS COUNTY/MO GRTD/CTORD: PROBATION IS TRANSFERRED FROM SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY TO STANISLAUS COUNTY/X:COURT ORDER IS SIGNED AND FILED,/

/CAL: SENTENCING/AJW/CH1:ISS:PROB 5 Y:PJ 1Y/CTS:194/4019HALF/WS/WEAP/290/RESTV/X: CHARGE IS CONSIDERED A STRIKE/CTORD: AS A CONDITION OF PROBATION,DEFENDANT AGREES TO SPECIAL CONDITIONSOF PROBATION - SEX OFFENDERS, AS STATED ON THE RECORD/CTORD: GPS TO BE DETERMINED BY APD UNDER CONDITIONS AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD/X: PURSUANT TO PC 1203,065(B)(2), THE CURCUMSTANCESFOR THE DISPOSITION ARE THE FOLLOWING AND ALSO STATED FOR THE RECORD:/X:1) HIGH RISK TO PRESECUTION TO OBTAIN A CONVICTION/X: 2) MITIGATION PACKETPROVIDED BY DEFENDSE TO THE PROSECUTION/X: 3) DEFENDANT HAS BEEN IN CUSTODY SINCE JANUARY OF 2019/X: 4) DEFENDNAT HAS NO PRIOR ARRESTS OR CONVICTIONS/X: 5) DEFENDANT IS 22 YEARS OLD AND HAS NO JUVENILE RECORD/X: 6) MATTER WAS DISCUSSED WITH THE VICTIM AND CONSENTS TO A PROBATION DISPOSITION/X:7) COMPAS ASSESSMENT IS LOW/X: 8) SARATSO SCORE IS AVERAGE/X: 9) APD RECOMMENDED PROBATION/SAORD/SA1: JOCEYLN N/DNACOMP/PPRFCOMP/IND/VF4:300/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/COLLECT/OBEY/ACCEP/CONTD: RESTITUTION DETERMINATION ON10-09-19/DOPU: COUNSEL/
/CAL: DISPOSITION/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF G//DEFT ADV RTS:   1/FNDG/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/PRES: 07-26-19/PPRFCUST//REMA/ARBUCKLE/CONTD: SENTENCING/DOP/

/X:SPANISH INTERPRETER NOT REQUIRED - CANCELLED/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) &DEN OF ALLEG/FAW/DEFTARR/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/LDTR: 07-12-19/CONTD: PRETRIAL CONFERENCE-S23 AND TRIAL-S22/DOP/

/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/INTRW:SPANISH/WIT SWORN:MARK MITCHINSON/X:COURTGRANTS PEOPLE'S MOTION TO DISMISS COUNT 3 PURSUANT TO PC1385/HTA1:1 & 2//BAIL:450,000/DEFTCUST3/SHERCOM1/CONTD: ARRAIGNMENT/DOP/

/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING, MOTION TO DETAIN & PEOPLE'S MOT TO CONT/X:COURTGRANTS PEOPLE'S MOTION TO CONTINUE/X:SPANISH INTERPRETER IS WAIVED FOR TODAY/TE:90 MIN/CONTD: PRELIMINARY HEARING & MOTION TO DETAIN/DOP/
/CAL: PRE-HEARING CONFERENCE AND MOTION TO DETAIN/X: SPANISH INTERPRETER IS WAIVED FOR TODAY/X: VICTIM, JOCELYN N, IS PRESENT/4011,5/TE: 2 HOURS//CONTD: PRELIMINARY HEARING AND MOTION TO DETAIN/DOP/

/CAL:I&A, P&C/INTC/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/STWPX/CTORD:AS A CONDITION OF BAIL, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL  MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE ANDIS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD,/CTORD:DEFENDANT IS TO REPORT TO 70 OAK GROVE BY 12:00 PM ON THE NEXT BUSINESS DAY,/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CTORD:AS A CONDITIONOF BAIL, DEFENDANT TO OBEY CURFEW BETWEEN THE HOURS OF 1PM TO 3AM/CONTD:PREHEARING CONF AND MOTION TO DETAIN/DOP/
/CAL:RESTITUTION DETERMINATION/CTORD:GENERAL ORDER OF RESTITUTION AS TO ANY VICTIMS/RESTR/CONTPROB/
